name: plane-mcp
description: MCP server for Plane — read and manage projects, work items, comments, states, labels, and members.
long_description: Access your Plane workspace from Claude. Works with Plane Cloud (api.plane.so) and self-hosted instances. Exposes 12 tools covering projects, work items (issues), comments, states, labels, and workspace members.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects in the workspace.

tools.name: list_work_items
tools.description: List work items (issues) in a project.

tools.name: get_work_item
tools.description: Fetch a single work item with full description.

tools.name: update_work_item
tools.description: Patch fields of an existing work item.

tools.name: list_states
tools.description: List workflow states (Backlog, Todo, …) for a project.

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List labels defined in a project.

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description: List comments on a work item.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Post a comment on a work item.

api_key.title: Plane API Key
api_key.description: Create one in Plane → Workspace Settings → API Tokens.

base_url.title: Plane Base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your Plane instance, no trailing slash (e.g. https://api.plane.so or https://plane.example.com).

workspace_slug.title: Workspace Slug
workspace_slug.description: The workspace slug from your Plane URL (https://plane.example.com/<slug>/…).
